name: Dual Model Supervisor
description: Dual-model supervision: course correction, memory guarding, and safety filtering

enabled.description: Enable or disable the supervisor system

supervisorModel.description: Reviewer model in provider/model format (e.g. openai/gpt-4o-mini). Leave empty to disable.

reviewMode.description: off=disabled, filter-only=safety filtering only, correct=filter+course correction, full=filter+correction+memory guard

enabled.description: Enable memory guardian (compaction protection + loss detection)

keyCategories.description: Categories of information to protect from compaction

deviationThreshold.description: Deviation score threshold (0-1) above which correction is triggered

highRiskTools.description: Tools whose calls will be reviewed before execution
